# Session Skein

> A fast, local-first control plane for Codex CLI projects, sessions, recall, and
> audited reconnectable workers.

Session Skein uses the locally installed Codex CLI and its existing ChatGPT
authentication. It requires no API key, daemon, systemd unit, tmux server, or Agent
Deck installation. Private state lives in a per-user SQLite database.

## Install this repository

- Read [INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md) completely; it is the normative human/agent contract.
- Linux/macOS catalog profile: `./install.sh`
- Linux/macOS control profile: `./install.sh --control`
- Windows catalog profile: `./install.ps1`
- Windows control profile: `./install.ps1 -Control`
- Verify `skein --version`, `skein doctor`, the `session-skein` MCP registration,
  and the skill path under the active `CODEX_HOME`.
- Installation must not add scan roots, enable transcript/memory recall, or start a
  Codex worker without separate user intent.

- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md)
- [Roadmap](ROADMAP.md)

## Source map

- `crates/skein-core`: durable domain model, SQLite, indexing, matching, control,
  worker fencing, and conductor policy.
- `crates/skein-codex`: Codex app-server protocol adapter.
- `crates/skein-cli`: CLI, human/JSON output, Ratatui TUI, MCP server, and worker
  process/IPC runtime.
- `plugins/session-skein`: distributable Codex plugin and workflow skill.

## Development contract

Read [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) and [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md). Keep observation
separate from control; use only synthetic public fixtures; run formatting, strict
Clippy, all-feature tests, release build, and RustSec audit.
